### Enhancement A: Wall Autotiling (4-bit Bitmask)
- `/mnt/data/clungiverse-client-v2/src/renderer/tile-renderer.ts` — Complete rewrite of wall rendering. Each wall tile computes a 4-bit cardinal neighbor mask (N/E/S/W). All 16 possible masks map to distinct wall shapes: isolated pillars, stubs, corners, T-junctions, horizontal/vertical segments, and solid interior fills. Interior walls (mask 15) render darker.
